changeSet.author: ahri-inventory

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.table_constraints WHERE constraint_schema = 'clinlims' AND table_name = 'inventory_item' AND constraint_name = 'fk_inventory_item_analyzer'

changeSet.comment: Drop FK that requires numeric analyzer_id before reverting the column type.

changeSet.author: ahri-inventory

and.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'clinlims' AND table_name = 'inventory_item' AND column_name = 'analyzer_id' AND udt_name = 'numeric'

changeSet.comment: Align inventory_item.analyzer_id with the InventoryItem entity (VARCHAR).
